DurielBiz POS

Desktop-first retail operations
Features Workflow Cloud Sync Cloud Dashboard Login
Local POS Login Create Cloud Account
Offline POS + Online Monitoring

Run each store locally. View the right business remotely.

DurielBiz gives each shop a fast local POS for sales and stock, while business owners monitor only their own branches from the cloud dashboard.

Last sync

2 min ago

Built for store operations and owner oversight

Keep cashiers and inventory staff working locally while owners and managers view the correct business remotely.

Desktop-first POS

Fast checkout, barcode search, inventory control, and receipts on the shop computer.

Branch isolation

Branch users only see their own branch. Admin controls all branches within the same business.

Cloud monitoring

Owners sign into the cloud dashboard to see synced sales, branches, and activity for their business.

Automatic sync ready

Configure scheduled sync intervals so local branches keep the cloud dashboard current.

01

Run the POS locally

Each branch records sales, purchases, and stock changes locally for speed and offline reliability.

02

Sync to the cloud

Use a secure token and ingest URL to push branch data to the remote business dashboard.

03

Monitor remotely

Business owners log into the cloud dashboard and see only their own stores and branches.

Cloud dashboard access

Businesses create an online account, copy the sync token and ingest URL, then connect each local POS branch from Business Settings.
